ddls:
CREATE TABLE "batteries" (
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery model */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number or designation of the battery */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage rating of the battery in volts */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the battery in milliamp-hours (mAh) */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the battery in millimeters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the battery in millimeters */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the battery in millimeters */,
  "c_rate" TEXT /* Continuous discharge C rate of the battery */,
  "burst" TEXT /* Burst discharge C rate of the battery */,
  "chemistry_type" TEXT /* Type of battery chemistry (e.g., lithium-ion, nickel-cadmium) */,
  "cycle_life" INTEGER /* Expected cycle life of the battery */,
  "self_discharge_rate" REAL /* Self-discharge rate of the battery per month */,
  "storage_temperature_range" TEXT /* Recommended storage temperature range for the battery */,
  "operating_temperature_range" TEXT /* Operating temperature range for the battery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications (e.g., ISO 9001, ISO 14001) */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production batch */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery model produced */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was manufactured */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of batteries produced in the batch */,
  "defect_rate" REAL /* Defect rate of the produced batteries */,
  "production_line" TEXT /* Production line where the batch was produced */,
  "quality_control_check" INTEGER /* Whether the batch passed quality control checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_batches_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery model used */,
  "application" TEXT /* Application where the battery is used (e.g., electric vehicle, smartphone) */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of usage */,
  "performance_metric" REAL /* Performance metric (e.g., discharge rate, lifespan) */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during usage (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_usage_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health check record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery model being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the health check */,
  "state_of_health" REAL /* State of health of the battery (percentage) */,
  "voltage_reading" REAL /* Voltage reading during the health check */,
  "internal_resistance" REAL /* Internal resistance of the battery during the health check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_health_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery model */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory standard */,
  "compliance_level" TEXT /* Compliance level (e.g., Compliant, Non-Compliant) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when compliance was achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_standards_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery model being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the battery model (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the battery model */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_reviews_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level granted to the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranty_information" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery model covered by the warranty */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Warranty start date */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Warranty end date */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Details of warranty coverage */,
  "warranty_provider" TEXT /* Name of the warranty provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_information_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recall_information" (
  "recall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recall record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery model subject to the recall */,
  "recall_date" TEXT /* Date of the recall announcement */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recall */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the recall */,
  "recall_status" TEXT /* Current status of the recall (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recall_information_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery model in inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the battery model in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the battery model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery model sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of batteries sold */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the batteries were sold */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., online, offline, wholesale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery model being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer about the battery model */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_evaluation" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier evaluation */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the supplier (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the supplier's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_lifecycle" (
  "lifecycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifecycle record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery model */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Current stage in the lifecycle (e.g., design, production, recycling) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the battery model entered the current stage */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the battery model's lifecycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifecycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_lifecycle_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_testing" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery model being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test performed (e.g., discharge rate, capacity) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_testing_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battery model */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_certifications_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)
